description: Activate, strengthen and enhance your leg muscles with this pair of Shape-Ups trainers from skechers. With a great mesh, synthetic leather and suede combination upper in attractive colors, these shoes are designed to activate your muscles, enhance maneuverability for a natural gait, and optimize support, flexibility and cushioning. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Synthetic and suede overlays for reinforcement and added style Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilationBrand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Progressive suspension midsole cage which is a high-durometer EVA cradle that disperses your weight and offers a stabilizing platform for high intensity activities Outsole Structural kinetic wishbone framework to control motion and focus instability into each pod High density rubber outsole with Resalyte Kinetic Toning Pods that utilise convex-shaped contact points to create bi-axial instability and activate muscle toning shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
